title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.240 - Missouri sliced bread day designated for July 7
text:
9.240.  Missouri sliced bread day designated for July 7. — July seventh of each year shall be designated as "Missouri Sliced Bread Day".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to commemorate the first sale of sliced bread on July 7, 1928, in Chillicothe, Missouri.
(L. 2019 H.B. 266 merged with H.B. 565)
